name: AAC
description: Advanced Audio Coding, a digital audio format designed to be the successor of MP3, offering improved sound quality at similar bit rates.

name: MP3
description: MPEG Audio Layer III, a widely-used digital audio format that compresses audio data to reduce file size while maintaining acceptable sound quality.

name: WAV
description: Waveform Audio File Format, an uncompressed audio format that provides high-quality sound but larger file sizes.

name: FLAC
description: Free Lossless Audio Codec, an audio format that compresses audio without any loss of quality, maintaining the original sound quality at reduced file sizes.
